creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to lightside from comment #7)

Regarding the change to gnustep uses, you should propose the change you want to apply to the file in it's own PR explaining why the change is needed. An exp-run will be required.


Regarding maintainership, you have no obligation to become maintainer, obviously, I just had to ask if you were interested.

I'm almost done with testing, will commit this one soon.

Thanks.
